description: Create a dynamic biomathematical model of a sunflower seed head in GeoGebra to visualize how the Golden Angle (≈137.508°) optimizes seed packing. The construction must feature a divergence angle variable with a range of 130° to 145°, a step of 0.001, and an initial value of 137.508°. Use a scaling parameter c = 0.5 and Vogel's formula (radius r = c * sqrt(n) and angle theta = n * angle) to generate a dynamic pattern of at least 500 points. Save the final construction to ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/sunflower_model.ggb.
